articles.author: J. Simon Leitner
articles.title: The 7430U CPU scandal could spread: Another manufacturer under suspicion, ODM comes into the spotlight - Notebookcheck
articles.description: While we recently found Chuwi guilty of CPU fraud twice, there are now indications that another Asia-based brand, Ninkear, could be affected. We also have a sample of this laptop at our disposal and are investigating immediately. Spoiler: The result exonerate…
articles.content: So far, we have checked three laptops with an alleged 7430U CPU for a suspected deviating CPU and have found it twice (on two different devices/mainboards, from the same ODM) at the manufacturer Chuw… [+1328 chars]
